commit.subject: LU-17025 revert "llapi: Verify stripe pool name"
commit.message:
LU-17025 revert "llapi: Verify stripe pool name"

This reverts commit ee7dfc5ad17d322e2e27ea2629c4a2d8e11a3507.
This breaks the use of "ignore" as a pool name to ignore pool
inheritance, and breaks ost-pools.sh test_32 that tests it.

Change-Id: I1ccc40f54768479e3d9a19bd873bc68715910d2e
Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-flr,sanity-pfl,ost-pools
Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
